seo.meta_description: Book a professional podcast interview at your next ecommerce conference. Free 3-minute spotlight, $100 deep dive, or full content package. Talk Commerce records, Content Cucumber writes.
seo.og_description: Talk Commerce interviews you on camera at the conference. Content Cucumber turns it into blog articles, social clips, and case studies. Free, $100, or custom packages.

thankyou.title: You're on the list.
thankyou.text: We'll reach out shortly to confirm your interview slot and send a short prep guide.

data.title:
One interview.
Months of content.
paragraphs: Talk Commerce records a professional podcast interview with your team at the conference. Content Cucumber's 40+ writers turn that conversation into blog articles, social clips, case studies, and SEO content.
Three packages. Limited to 8 interviews per event. See our full conference video production service.

data.title: Interview Packages
data.subtitle: Every package includes a professional on-camera interview at your booth. We bring the gear and guide the conversation. Higher tiers add written content from Content Cucumber's team.

items.name: Spotlight
items.target: A quick, professional interview that introduces your brand to the Talk Commerce podcast audience.

form_modal.heading: Book Your Free Interview
form_modal.subtitle: Tell us which event you're attending and we'll confirm your slot.

outcomes: Published on the Talk Commerce podcast
Shareable video clip for your channels

items.name: Deep Dive
items.target: A full-length conversation. Tell your story, explain your product, and share your perspective on the industry.
outcomes: Published as a full podcast episode
Multiple edited clips for social media
B-roll footage of your booth included
Raw footage delivered to your team

items.name: Full Content Package
items.target: Talk Commerce records. Content Cucumber writes. One interview becomes a complete content library for your marketing team.

form_modal.heading: Let's Build Your Content Package
form_modal.subtitle: Tell us about your event and goals. We'll schedule a quick call to scope your package.

outcomes: Case study written by Content Cucumber
Social media content calendar with clips

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: No scripts. No awkward setups. We come to you.

steps.title: Pick Your Package
steps.text: Choose Spotlight (free), Deep Dive ($100), or Full Content Package (custom). Fill out the form and we'll confirm your slot.

steps.title: We Come to Your Booth
steps.text: Talk Commerce shows up with pro gear and guides a natural, relaxed conversation. No scripts, no teleprompters. Just your team talking about what they know.

steps.title: Content Delivered
steps.text: Talk Commerce edits and publishes the episode. For Full Content packages, Content Cucumber's writers produce blog articles, case studies, and social content from the interview.

items.question: What if our team isn't comfortable on camera?
items.answer: That's exactly why we guide the conversation. No scripts, no teleprompters. We ask questions your team already knows the answers to and keep it relaxed. We've done hundreds of these.

items.question: When will we receive the final content?
items.answer: Video clips and published episodes within two weeks. Written content (blog articles, case studies) within three weeks. Rush delivery available.

items.question: Can we use the footage for our own marketing?
items.answer: Yes. You receive all clips, raw footage, and full permission to use them across your channels. Social media, website, email campaigns, sales decks. It's your content.

items.question: Which conferences do you cover?
items.answer: We cover major ecommerce and B2B conferences across the US, including Shop Talk, eTail, and industry-specific shows. Tell us which event you're attending and we'll confirm availability.

items.question: What are Talk Commerce and Content Cucumber?
items.answer: Talk Commerce is a podcast and media platform with 500+ episodes focused on ecommerce. Content Cucumber is a content creation agency with 40+ human writers. Talk Commerce records the interview. Content Cucumber turns it into written content. One conversation, a full marketing library.

data.title: Ready to book your interview?
data.text: 8 slots per event. Tell us which conference you're attending and which package you want. PR agencies: see our agency content services.
